case_title: GRACE CHIN VS. IRVING RENE SERRANO et al

docket_entries.description: UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CHIN, GRACE AS TO DEFENDANT SERRANO, IRVING RENE DOES 1 TO 10, IN OCCUPANCY SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

RECEIVED REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT, CLERK'S JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CHIN, GRACE AS TO DEFENDANT SERRANO, IRVING RENE DOES 1 TO 10, IN OCCUPANCY
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, SATISFIED AS TO REAL PROPERTY ONLY AS TO DEFENDANT SERRANO, IRVING RENE

DECLARATION OF AARON A. FARMER, ESQ. RE FAIR RENTAL VALUE OF $33.33 AND UNAVAILABILITY OF ORIGINAL LEASE FILED BY PLAINTIFF CHIN, GRACE

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CHIN, GRACE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SERRANO, IRVING RENE DOES 1 TO 10, IN OCCUPANCY THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 3270 21ST, UNIT #410A, SAN FRANCISCO, CA. 94110 CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, LEASE FORFEITED, ** INCLUDING ANY/ALL UNKNOWN -UNNAMED OCCUPANTS OF THE PREMISE ** SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
